metadata.title: The Captain of Her Heart
metadata.album: The Captain of Her Heart (Special Long Version)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:04.27] It was way past midnight
[00:34.33] And she still couldn't fall asleep
[00:40.76] This night the dream was leavin'
[00:51.12] She tried so hard to keep
[00:57.05] And with the new day's dawning
[01:00.75] She felt it driftin' away
[01:05.79] Not only for a cruise
[01:10.38] Not only for a day
[01:13.76] Too long ago, too long apart
[01:30.57] She couldn't wait another day for
[01:33.96] The captain of her heart
[01:38.62] As the day came up she made a start
[01:50.41] She stopped waiting another day for
[01:53.75] The captain of her heart
[01:58.54] Too long ago, too long apart
[02:20.38] She couldn't wait another day for
[02:23.86] The captain of her heart
[02:28.39]
